data.title: ElfQuest The Rebels #1-4 6-9 11 12 Near-Complete 10-Issue Lot Warp Graphics
data.description:
ElfQuest: The Rebels ran from 1994 to 1996 as WaRP Graphics expanded the ElfQuest universe with a new cast of characters venturing beyond the known world. This is a near-complete run of 10 issues — #1 through 4, #6 through 9, and #11 and #12. Only #5 and #10 are missing.

Stored bagged with individual backing boards by a careful collector. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage.

Series | ElfQuest: The Rebels
Publisher | WaRP Graphics
Issues | #1-4, 6-9, 11, 12 (10 issues)
Missing | #5 and #10
Year | 1994-1996
Condition | VF, bagged and boarded

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer. Comics are packed securely with cardboard backing to protect against bending in transit.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Near-complete run of ElfQuest: The Rebels (WaRP Graphics, 1994-1996), issues #1-4, 6-9, 11, and 12. 10 issues total. Missing #5 and #10. All issues individually bagged with backing boards. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage noted.
